description: GPT assigns a task to Claude Code queue. Required: description. Optional: priority, context, create_output_doc, batch_id, agent_id, auto_execute. Auto-generates deterministic task_id from description hash.
Retroactively update completed tasks with cost/token data from agent logs. Fixes timing issue where log_task_completion runs before agent writes final JSON telemetry.
Assign multiple tasks at once. Optional: parallel (1-3, auto-assigns agent_ids round-robin). Used internally by self_assign_from_doc.
Stage multiple tasks at once. Takes a list of task dicts (each with description, optional preset). Tasks appear in dashboard staging stack without triggering execution.
Check status of a task. Required: task_id. Returns: queued, in_progress, done, error, cancelled.
Clear all staged tasks. Called by dashboard after Execute All moves staged tasks to the queue.
Spawns Claude Code session(s) to process queued tasks. Optional: parallel (1-3 agents), agent_id (filter to specific agent). Prison guard enforces max 3 agents.
Get all staged tasks from the staging file. Used by dashboard to display the staging stack.
Kill all running parallel agents and clean up lockfile. Use when agents go rogue or need to abort execution.
Internal: Claude calls this when completing a task. Required: task_id, status. Optional: actions_taken, output, output_summary, errors, execution_time_seconds. GPT should NOT call this.

updates.description: Internal: Claude calls this when completing a task. Required: task_id, status. Optional: actions_taken, output, output_summary, errors, execution_time_seconds, category (code_modification|doc_creation|infrastructure|diagnostic|annotation|client_work|uncategorized). GPT should NOT call this.

description: Async version: writes marker file for background processing. Returns immediately after file write.
Internal: Claude calls this when starting a task. Marks status as in_progress. GPT should NOT call this.
Parse tasks from markdown document text. Extracts complete multi-line task descriptions including indented lines, code blocks, numbered lists, and doc links.
Internal: Claude calls this to get queued tasks. Optional: agent_id (only returns tasks for this agent). GPT should NOT call this.
One-command task import from Outline doc. Fetches doc, parses tasks (# headers), generates deterministic task_ids, batch writes to queue. Optional: parallel (1-3 agents), test_mode.

example: Sync new docs to vector index

description: Archives single email in Gmail (moves to archive folder, removes from INBOX) via Nylas API. folder_id defaults to Label_4287 (Unmistakable Archive). Usually called automatically by sync_archived_emails - rarely needs manual use.

Generates pre-rendered intelligent email briefing (chunk size fixed at 10 emails). Returns executive summary + reply table with inline summaries + read items + relax overview. GPT renders the briefing with full context from email bodies. Navigate chunks by changing chunk_index (0 = first chunk, 1 = second, etc).

Claude-powered consolidated inbox briefing. Reads all emails from inbox_summary.json, generates single comprehensive brief via Anthropic API. Preserves all existing tagging logic - just reads pre-tagged data. Outputs to data/daily_inbox_brief.json with executive summary, priority replies, notable items, updates breakdown, and recommended actions. Eliminates need for chunked briefing iteration.
Fetches all inbox emails, auto-tags them, and writes to data/inbox_summary.json. Returns tag counts (Reply/Read/Update/Relax). Run this first to create the summary file.

Generates grouped summary of ALL Update-tagged emails. Groups by sender domain/service (e.g. GitHub: 3 updates, Stripe: 2 updates). Returns formatted markdown summary. Use when user asks to see all updates.
Cancels a scheduled email by schedule_id. Email will not be sent. Use list_scheduled_emails to find schedule_ids.
Permanently deletes email from Gmail via Nylas API. Use with caution - this is irreversible. Archive is usually preferred over delete.
Fetches inbox emails from Nylas, cleans body content for tagging only (body not stored in summary), auto-tags each message with Reply/Read/Update/Relax. Supports pagination.
Returns ALL emails with specific tag (Reply/Read/Update/Relax). No chunking - returns full list. Use for filtering or when generating summaries of specific tag types.
Lists all scheduled emails that havent been sent yet. Returns schedule_id, subject, recipient, scheduled_for time, and status for each pending email.

Generates inbox_latest.json template from inbox_summary.json. Creates structured dashboard data with what_happened stats, updates section with financial items, revisit section for replied threads, and action section for threads needing reply. All FILL markers need to be populated by Claude afterward.
Fetches full email body content from Nylas API for a specific message_id. Use when user needs to read full email content (not included in summary to keep file small).
Reads inbox_summary.json in chunks of 10 emails (default). Returns chunk data + chunk_info + summary_stats across ALL emails. Use this to paginate through inbox.

Replies to email with proper threading. Fetches original sender/subject, adds Re: prefix, sends reply via Nylas. Automatically tags original email as Replied + Archive and syncs to Gmail (email disappears from inbox). Optional: attachments (list of file paths to attach). Use this instead of send_email when responding to existing emails.
Searches inbox_summary.json by sender email, subject keywords, or tag. At least one search parameter required. Returns matching emails with filter details.

Sends beautifully formatted email via Nylas. Script automatically handles HTML formatting and styling. Just provide recipient email, subject line, and plain text body. Optional: send_at (unix timestamp) to schedule email for later delivery, attachments (list of file paths to attach). Use for brand new emails (not replies).

Universal email-from-template function. Works across any context (investor, beta_user, journalist). Looks up person in context-specific CRM, fetches template from Outline, personalizes, sends, updates CRM with standardized tracking fields. Required: name, context, email_type. Optional: test_mode (uses test CRM files), send_at (unix timestamp for scheduling).

Send personalized investor outreach email. Fetches template from Outline, personalizes with CRM data, sends with tracking, updates CRM with thread_id. Required: investor_key. Optional: email_type (initial/followup1), crm_file (default: data/orchestrate_fundraise_crm.json), template_doc_id.

Scans inbox_summary.json for emails tagged with Archive, archives each in Gmail via Nylas API, removes archived emails from JSON file. Returns archived_count and remaining_count. Usually triggered automatically by tag_inbox_entry when Archive tag added.

Adds tags to email in inbox_summary.json. Tags can be string or list. If Archive tag added, automatically triggers sync_archived_emails (archives in Gmail + removes from JSON). Use for manual tagging or re-categorization.
